---
title: "list_models.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\list_models.py"
loc: 21
complexity: 4
logic_score: 7.30
style_score: 3.97
intel_score: 9.02
overall_score: 5.35
---

## Intent
The `list_models.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on ModelLister, execute. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via ModelLister, execute. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [dotenv](file://dotenv)
- [google](file://google)

### Exports
- `ModelLister`
- `execute`
